settings.title: Preview first
settings.text: See the direction before committing to production. Mock-ups give confidence that the tone and composition feel right.

settings.title: Artist finished
settings.text: Every piece is completed by a painter, not generated and shipped. The preview guides the work; the artist refines it.

settings.title: Made for the wall
settings.text: Frames, finishes, and packaging are chosen so the piece arrives ready to hang and built to last.
